MOBILEIMPROVEMENTS.SettingsPauseRenderin: Pauses rendering of the map while in the "App" view
MOBILEIMPROVEMENTS.SettingsShowToggleHin: Shows a toggle button in the top left for toggling mobile mode manually
MOBILEIMPROVEMENTS.SettingsShowChatOnRol: Show chat on users own dice roll
Shows the chat window for a user when they roll dice, to show the results
MOBILEIMPROVEMENTS.SettingsShowRollBubbl: Show your dice roll results as a popup
Shows a temporary popup with the result of your dice rolls
MOBILEIMPROVEMENTS.AboutText: Mobile Improvements helps you use Foundry on your phone or tablet. Created with love by Sunspots.
MOBILEIMPROVEMENTS.MaxTextureSizeExceede: The scene background texture ({width}x{height}) exceeds the maximum size for your device ({maxTextureSize}px) and cannot be loaded.
